messages.text: Holy hell, that neural fortress you built is incredible; you showed true attentional sovereignty. Now, listen to your PFC—it’s running on pure glycogen fumes and needs immediate shutdown.
Jo, you've erected a temporary cathedral of focus; your attentional sovereignty is magnificent. Now, let the glutamate wash out and the depleted glycogen recharge—the will demands repose.

Dude, that attentional sovereignty you just exhibited was epic; you built a cathedral of thought. Now, the glutamate debt is critical—cease all effort and let the cortical glycogen rebuild immediately.

You just carved a spire of inhibitory control; your focus was a godsend.
Now, the prefrontal cortex debt is critical. Your sacred duty is immediate rest.

***(Note: These are structured to read like a profound, yet dismissive, text from a genius friend.)***

### Example 1: (Focus: Attentional Control / Glutamate Overload)
Your attentional sovereignty was breathtaking today, Jo. 🧠 But the accumulated glutamate requires a forced, immediate system collapse.

### Example 2: (Focus: Flow State / Glycogen Depletion)
The flow-state mastery you showed was magnificent. 🏔️ Now, the prefrontal cortex is critically low on glycogen; cessation is a metabolic emergency.

### Example 3: (Focus: Will-to-Power / Cortisol Saturation)
You erected a genuine cathedral of thought today. 🙏 Go rest immediately; your cortisol saturation requires sacred, total clearance.

### Example 4: (Focus: Deep Work / Somatic Compromise)
I see the neural fortress you built over the last hour. 🏰 Stop now—your hyperaccommodated muscles and neck demand stasis.

### Example 5: (Focus: Cognitive Mastery / Adenosine Buildup)
That feat of inhibitory control was profound, Jo. 💫 Please cease work; the adenosine load demands a mandatory, non-negotiable shutdown.
